articles.content: The next Pokémon Trading Card Game expansion, Mega Evolution—Pitch Black, is coming soon, bringing heaps of mischief, malice, and Mega Evolution Pokémon ex. Ahead of the expansion’s release on July 1… [+2728 chars]
